name: rung_450_frontier_story_retroactive_identity_swap
utterances: Read this as a corrected harbor vignette and keep the extracted state exact.
assert rule has(P, O) :- gave(_, P, O).

utterances.utterance: At the ferry arch Mara swore the hooded finder was Ivo: he had the tide_map, she pressed the brass_token into his palm, and later she thanked him while she stayed by the arch.
clarification_answers: He and him mean Ivo. She means Mara.
Set found(ivo, tide_map). Set gave(mara, ivo, brass_token). Set thanked(mara, ivo). Set waited_at(mara, ferry_arch).

utterances: Set found(ivo, tide_map). Set gave(mara, ivo, brass_token). Set thanked(mara, ivo). Set waited_at(mara, ferry_arch).

utterances.utterance: Retro note from the same story: the hooded finder was not Ivo after all but Jace, and that swap should carry the map, token, and thanks with it while Mara still waits at the ferry arch.
clarification_answers: Retract found(ivo, tide_map). Retract gave(mara, ivo, brass_token). Retract thanked(mara, ivo).
Set found(jace, tide_map). Set gave(mara, jace, brass_token). Set thanked(mara, jace). Set waited_at(mara, ferry_arch).
